prompt: I want to model an aggressive scenario: increase units to 75,000, drop variable cost to $35, cut fixed costs to $800,000.
assertions: Writes all three assumptions via idfa_ops.py write
Triggers recalculation at least once after all writes
Reports Year 2 Net Income (~$3.36M, roughly +96% from baseline)
Reads the result from the model via idfa_ops.py read
Presents results with a clear before/after comparison
The output file contains the complete scenario
